title: Christmas Velvet Ribbon - Thick Red Wired 9m Edge 63mm Wide for Gift Wrapping, Crafting, Christmas Tree Decorations, Xmas Party Gifts, Wreath, Wedding Supplies
features: Christmas Wired Ribbon: Our package includes 1 roll of 10 yards red velvet Christmas ribbon, measuring 6.35cm/2.5in wide. It is enough to meet your Christmas gift wrapping and other crafts decoration needs, you can also cut it to fit your needs. The classic Christmas colors will create a warm and festive atmosphere

Premium Velvet Material: Christmas tree ribbon is made of high quality velvet material, feel comfortable and smooth, durable, not easy to pull and deform, can be used for a long time. Featuring Christmas colors with bright metallic gold edges, the flexible metal wire allows you to shape the ribbon into various designs, such as flowers, butterflies, and bows. Wire edging means it keeps its shape beautifully.

Wide Application: This wired Christmas ribbon will add a luxurious touch to your gift wrapping or decorations. Use it for tree trimming, gift bows, wreath supplies, garland, tree topper bows, chair sashes, wedding decor, or wrap it around your Christmas trees for a stunning display. Red velvet Christmas tree ribbon is perfect for creating a warm and inviting atmosphere

Easy to Use: Our red velvet ribbon comes in a roll design, the roll is designed to make it easy to pull out the ribbon without tangling. Can be used for DIY projects or to add a gorgeous touch of colour to your festive decor. Cut the length you need to suit your decorating needs. This ribbon is super easy and convenient to use and store, adding instant charm and elegance to your projects

Beautiful Ribbon Decorations: Xmas wired ribbon has a shiny shine that reflects the holiday spirit! Use it for indoor or outdoor decorations, gift bows, wreaths, garlands, scrapbooking, floral arrangements, and more. It is a perfect addition to your Christmas, wedding, party, birthday, or Valentine's Day decorations, leaving a deep impression on your friends and family
